final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: architectural photography, wide panoramic shot
Primary request: full view of a famous Zen temple's karesansui dry landscape garden in Kyoto, Japan
Scene/backdrop: traditional Japanese Zen temple courtyard with low wooden veranda corridors, ancient earthen wall with moss on top
Subject: meticulously raked white gravel forming concentric circles and ripple patterns symbolizing ocean waves, moss-covered rocks of varying shapes representing islands and mountain peaks
Style/medium: architectural photography, wide-angle lens, low-angle perspective
Composition/framing: wide panoramic view, low angle shot emphasizing geometric patterns and spatial depth
Lighting/mood: autumn afternoon slanted sunlight, warm beige-white gravel, elongated rock shadows, serene and deeply meditative Zen atmosphere
Color palette: warm off-white gravel, deep moss green, weathered wood brown, aged earth wall beige, soft amber sunlight
Materials/textures: fine raked white gravel with precise patterns, velvety moss on rocks, weathered wooden veranda, aged earthen wall with moss, natural stone textures
Constraints: preserve the geometric precision of the raked gravel patterns, maintain the tranquil Zen aesthetic, keep the low wooden corridor shadows aligned
Avoid: oversaturated colors, modern elements, people in frame, artificial lighting, cluttered composition
